text_original: Please make the group can add 4-5 bots please 🥺
text_zh: 请让群组可以添加4-5个机器人，拜托了 🥺
reply_original:
Wow, what a fantastic idea! Adding 4-5 bots to a group would definitely make the conversations even more chaotic and fun. I love your creativity!

I've logged this suggestion and shared it directly with our Product Team for review. If you have more "brainstorms," please email us at support@fantachat.ai. We are all ears!
reply_zh:
哇，真是个绝妙的主意！在群组中添加4-5个机器人肯定会让对话变得更加混乱有趣。我非常欣赏你的创意！

我已经记录了这个建议，并直接分享给我们的产品团队进行评估。如果你有更多“头脑风暴”，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。我们洗耳恭听！
